summary: Blocked Dates Calendar Fix Verified - All features working correctly. Availability API returns 28 blocked dates including PENDING bookings (April 1-5, 20-25). BookingDatePicker component correctly disables blocked dates and shows warning indicators.
seed_data_creation: Created test booking for April 15-17 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blocked dates feature fully verified. Availability API returns blocked dates from both calendar_blocks and bookings tables. PENDING status now included in query (lines 82-90 of route.js). Frontend BookingDatePicker correctly receives blockedDates array and disables those dates in calendar.

1_availability_api_blocked_dates.evidence: Returns 28 blocked dates for test listing

2_pending_status_included.test: PENDING booking dates included in blocked dates
2_pending_status_included.evidence: April 1-5 blocked by PENDING booking b-d2179ba7
2_pending_status_included.fix_applied: Added PENDING to status filter in availability route (line 88)

3_calendar_ui_blocked_indicator.evidence: Screenshot shows indicator at bottom of calendar popover

4_blocked_dates_disabled.test: Blocked dates cannot be selected in calendar

5_available_dates_selectable.evidence: Price breakdown shows correctly for 2 nights

6_price_calculation.test: Price breakdown shows rental cost + service fee

7_booking_creation.test: Booking creation succeeds for available dates
7_booking_creation.evidence: POST /api/v2/bookings returns success with booking ID

ui_verification.booking_modal_warning: Shows 'Some dates are not available for booking'
